title: Alphadome System: Classified Details

classified_sections.details: Proprietary cost/quality/compliance algorithms, internal rule sets, and completion/earnings logic.
Proprietary geometry/AI algorithms, job orchestration, monetization logic.
Fallback/payment logic, workflow automation, LLM prompt engineering.
Proprietary ML, federated learning, route optimization, data lineage/versioning.
Agent algorithms, plugin contracts, health monitoring, monetization.
Lead scoring, payment logic, compliance hooks, earnings model.
Prompt/generation orchestration, async job queue, credential management.
Payment/revenue logic, migration scripts, audit logs.
Decision/scoring algorithms, policy files, channel registry, earnings.
Workflow orchestration, API keys, updater system, caching, advanced features.
Kernel/bus extensibility, privileged event types, security hooks.

system_completion: Most core modules are 70–90% complete; advanced features and integrations are ongoing.
earnings: Earnings are generated via SaaS, subscriptions, commissions, and asset/NFT monetization. Detailed financials, proprietary algorithms, and internal protocols are classified.
